events.description: segment opens, background fades in softly
bell icon shakes in with notification dot — on 'Notifications'
'exploits a mechanism' text flashes red with lightning icons
big 'Variable Reward Scheduling' concept name scales up — key reveal moment
underline draws across concept name, subtitle appears below
scene crossfades from concept intro to slot machine visual
slot machine body springs into view — on 'slot'
'The Slot Machine Effect' title slides in — on 'machines'
three reel windows start spinning with blur effect
first reel locks in with spring pop — on 'buzz', outcomes start revealing
'Completely worthless' label appears dim grey — on 'worthless'
scene crossfades to conclusion — unpredictability visual
big 'Unpredictability' word scales up with orbiting question marks — key concept
gradient arrow connector draws from unpredictability toward addictive
'ADDICTIVE' slams in large red text with warning icons, brain pulses red — climactic moment
